subject: SCIENCE
title: describe how changes in solid materials make
objective: describe how changes in solid materials make them useful, such as when they are
introduction: Scientists ask the BEST questions: Why? How? What if? 🔬 Today we explore: describe how changes in solid materials. Put on your lab goggles (imaginary ones are fine!) and let's investigate!
